title: Field
description: Represents a field within an item that stores a value such as a username, password, or other data.

id.description: The unique identifier for the field.

purpose.description: The purpose of the field, indicating its role within the item.

label.description: The human-readable label for the field.

value.description: The value stored in the field.

generate.description: Whether the field value should be auto-generated.

entropy.description: The entropy (strength) of the generated value.
